items.raw_desc: Húshőmérő Ninja® WP100EU ProChef ProChef:The Ninja ProChef WP100EU wireless thermoprobe in silver and black allows precise temperature measurement for indoor and outdoor cooking. It has two temperature sensors that monitor not only the internal temperature of the food, but also the ambient temperature, so you can achieve excellent results when baking in the oven, frying in the fryer, grilling or smoking. It can be linked to the Ninja Pro Connect app. The app provides up-to-date information and professional guidance right on your phone.
